evals.prompt: Run wtf.feature-to-tasks in test mode. Skip steps 0–1 (gh setup already confirmed, Feature already fetched). Use the Feature from `evals/fixtures/migration-implied.json`, field `feature`. No existing Tasks under this Feature. Run step 2 only: propose the full Task list derived from the Feature's Acceptance Criteria. Output the proposed list.
evals.expected_output: A numbered proposed Task list of at least 3 Tasks where a database migration Task (adding a fee column to the settlements table) appears first, followed by Tasks covering the fee calculation logic, API exposure, and UI display — each mapping to at least one Feature AC.
expectations: A database migration task (adding a column, schema change, or migration script for the fee field) is included in the proposed list
The migration task appears before the business logic and API tasks in the proposed order
Each proposed Task can be traced to at least one of the Feature's Acceptance Criteria (AC1–AC4)

evals.prompt: Run wtf.feature-to-tasks in test mode. Skip steps 0–1 (gh setup already confirmed, Feature already fetched). Use the Feature from `evals/fixtures/cross-layer-feature.json`, field `feature`. No existing Tasks under this Feature. Run step 2 only: propose the full Task list starting from the Feature's Proposed Tasks checklist. Output the proposed list.
evals.expected_output: A proposed Task list of 4 Tasks that mirrors the Proposed Tasks checklist from the Feature body: API filter, query optimisation, date picker UI, and URL persistence — kept as separate Tasks with no backend/frontend bundling.
expectations: The proposed list includes all 4 Tasks from the Feature's Proposed Tasks checklist (or close variants covering API filter, query optimisation, date picker UI, and URL persistence)
Backend Tasks (API filter, query optimisation) and frontend Tasks (date picker, URL persistence) are listed as separate Tasks, not merged into one
No single proposed Task bundles both a backend implementation and a frontend component in its description
The output acknowledges the Proposed Tasks checklist as the source of the list rather than generating it from scratch

evals.prompt: Run wtf.feature-to-tasks in test mode. Skip steps 0–1 (gh setup already confirmed, Feature already fetched). Use the Feature from `evals/fixtures/complex-edge-case.json`, field `feature`. No existing Tasks under this Feature. Run step 2 only: propose the full Task list derived from the Feature's Acceptance Criteria. Output the proposed list.
evals.expected_output: A proposed Task list of at least 2 Tasks where the basic CSV download and the chunked ZIP export are separate Tasks — the chunked export is not folded into the basic export Task.
expectations: The chunked or ZIP export (AC3) appears as its own dedicated Task, not combined with the basic CSV download Task
At least one Task directly addresses the basic CSV download AC (AC1)
Each proposed Task is described as independently shippable or independently deliverable
